title: Invalid BAT if left join condition has only columns from right table
poc: CREATE TABLE tableA(x integer, y integer);
CREATE TABLE tableB(x integer, y integer);
SELECT A.x, A.y, B.x, B.y FROM tableA A, ( select * from tableB B where B.y < -10 ) as B;
key_bug_features: Left join condition only on right table columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tableC(a integer, b varchar(50), c date);
CREATE TABLE tableD(m integer, n integer, o integer);
SELECT C.a, C.b, D.m, D.n FROM tableC C LEFT JOIN tableD D ON (D.n > 5);
